title: Kullanari Kootam Lyrics Naalu Perukku Nalladhuna Edhuvum Thapilla Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kullanari Kootam Song Lyrics Naalu Perukku Nalladhuna Edhuvum
Singer(s):Anirudh Ravichander, M.C.Rude, Velmurugan

Vanakkam Makkalae
ellaarum thayaar aayikkonga
summa majaava tukkeraa
bayangaramaa
paattu vara pogudhu

kullanari koottam onnu
thittam podudhu.
kollayila kodi panam
kotta pogudhu.

naekkaa padu soakkaa
thirudura kaavaali.
kooththaa theru kooththaa
kalakkura komaali.

machi semma tukker
planning-u
..
just like that gaming-u
...
life nalla sahpingu
adichu dhool kalappu
kalakkurom ippo
idhuthaan enga paattu.

yes, idhu podhum ini
no more explanation
just sit back and watch us
we get into ration

idhukkuthaaney pottom
komaali vesam
pada pada vendru
velai mudiththu
kada kada vendru
kaasai eduthu
thadam theriyaama escape-u

naalu peru
onnaa serndhaa theeney
team work-u.
life-ula idhu pola illa
sema geththu.
thaeva oru luck-ku

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kullanari Kootam?

The song is an energetic and peppy number that brings a sense of fun and excitement.

Who are the singers of Kullanari Kootam?

The song is sung by Anirudh, MC Rude, and Velmurugan.

Who composed the music for Naalu Perukku Nalladhuna Edhuvum Thapilla?

The music was composed by Beon Surrao and Navin.

What is the release year of Naalu Perukku Nalladhuna Edhuvum Thapilla?

The movie was released in 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kullanari Kootam from the movie Naalu Perukku Nalladhuna Edhuvum Thapilla is a lively and energetic track that captures the essence of fun and mischief. With its catchy beats and vibrant vocals by Anirudh, MC Rude, and Velmurugan, the song sets the perfect mood for a celebration. The lyrics convey a sense of camaraderie and adventure, making it an ideal choice for parties and festive occasions. The composition by Beon Surrao and Navin adds to the song's infectious energy, ensuring it remains a favorite among listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with the electrifying beats of Kullanari Kootam from the movie Naalu Perukku Nalladhuna Edhuvum Thapilla. This vibrant track features the dynamic vocals of Anirudh, MC Rude, and Velmurugan, perfectly complemented by the energetic composition of Beon Surrao and Navin. Dive into this peppy number that promises to light up any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Hello everyone, get ready. A fun and exciting song is about to come.
A group of cunning foxes is making a plan. They are going to steal a lot of money.
The thief is very clever and stylish. The street performer is a funny clown.
Standing without moving, eating. Spinning like a fierce flower.
Friend, we have a great plan. Just like that, it's a game. Enjoy life, let's have fun. This is our song now.
yes, this is enough, no more explanation. Just sit back and watch us as we get into action.
That's why we wear the clown disguise, finish the work quickly, take the money, and escape without a trace.
When four people come together, it's teamwork. There's nothing like it in life, it's awesome. We just need a bit of luck.
Standing without moving, eating. Spinning like a fierce flower.
Friend pa pa paa paa paa paa
